backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no functionality, serving as a placeholder backend.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the CSS custom property changes to set background color to pure black (#000000) in OKLCH format across light and dark themes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend source files describing authentication flow, passkey validation, device name input, and Brazilian sensitivity value generation.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes with grayscale and red accent colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx, titled 'ENZOxSENSI'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component managing authentication state, screen transitions between passkey and device name entry, and sensitivity popup display with header/footer layout including skull logo and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/DeviceNameScreen: Device name input form with smartphone icon, '100% headshot rate' badge, and Generate button that triggers sensitivity popup when submitted.
frontend/src/components/PasskeyScreen.ts: Passkey authentication screen with instant client-side validation for 'enzonvrfall' passkey and Instagram follow note for obtaining the passkey.
frontend/src/components/SensitivityPopup: Modal dialog that generates and displays four random Brazilian sensitivity values (General, Red Dot, 2x, 4x ranging 50-200) using useMemo with isOpen dependency to regenerate on each popup open.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook for managing ICP backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, handling anonymous and authenticated actors with query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication using @dfinity/auth-client, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty file as the app uses only client-side logic with no backend queries required.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including color variables for UI components (background, foreground, primary, secondary, sidebar, etc.) using OKLCH color space, plus base styling for body and headings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up the root render with QueryClientProvider for data fetching, InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, and mounts the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors mapped to CSS variables (using OKLCH), border radius utilities, custom shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing ENZOxSENSI, a mobile app with passkey authentication ('enzonvrfall') that generates random Brazilian sensitivity settings (capped at 200) for gaming devices after device name input, with architectural notes emphasizing client-side validation and instant transitions.
